traits.name: Alzheimer's Disease Risk
traits.description: Genetic risk factors for late-onset Alzheimer's disease

traits.name: Type 2 Diabetes Risk
traits.description: Genetic predisposition to type 2 diabetes mellitus

traits.name: Coronary Artery Disease Risk
traits.description: Genetic risk factors for coronary artery disease

traits.name: sitting height measurement
traits.description: Quantification of some aspect of height, when assuming a sitting position.

traits.name: hypertension
traits.description: Persistently high systemic arterial blood pressure. Based on multiple readings (blood pressure determination), hypertension is currently defined as when systolic pressure is consistently greater than 140 mm Hg or when diastolic pressure is consistently 90 mm Hg or more. [MESH: D006973]

traits.name: diastolic blood pressure
traits.description: The blood pressure after the contraction of the heart while the chambers of the heart refill with blood.

traits.name: systolic blood pressure
traits.description: The blood pressure during the contraction of the left ventricle of the heart.

traits.name: obesity
traits.description: A disorder involving an excessive amount of body fat.
